note: Committed CI floor for the deep-recall eval (eval/run-deep-recall-eval.js). Deterministic: lexical recall + orchestrator over an in-fixture corpus, no embeddings/Ollama/network. minCasePassRate is the recall/orchestrator quality floor; maxScoreboard are hard security/quality ceilings (leaks must stay at 0). Loosen a floor only with a documented reason; tighten when the corpus or engine improves.
